case_title: EPMI, A BAYSIDE COMPANY VS. ANDRE TERRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EPMI, A BAYSIDE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, ANDRE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY (CCP 585(4)) RE: LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE EVID. CODE 1501,1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF EPMI, A BAYSIDE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, ANDRE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EPMI, A BAYSIDE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, ANDRE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EPMI, A BAYSIDE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION SERVED AUG-31-2015, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EPMI, A BAYSIDE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRY, ANDRE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 MASON STREET, #405, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
